notes: native-only path bypasses UI/canonical/template adapter entrypoints
FEBio CLI/Studio confirmation remains required for solver run validation

x.positive: from cell center toward the pipette/barrel side
x.negative: from pipette mouth toward cell interior

y.positive: one side of the thin 3D section
y.negative: opposite side of the thin 3D section

pressure.negativePressureEffect: intended to pull toward +x, into the pipette/barrel side

localSuctionPatch.relationToPipetteMouth: centered on pipette axis and evaluated against pipette_contact_surface centroid

pressureDiagnostics.negativePressureEffect: negative pressure on the top suction patch is intended to pull toward +z, into the pipette above the cell

couplingReadiness.interpretation: active pipette suction pressure surface is normal-aligned and tangentially colocated with the rigid mouth surface

duplicateCoordinateDiagnostics.note: duplicate-coordinate native nodes are intentional at material/contact boundaries; Gmsh imports may renumber them, so template native-id recovery is required for baseline comparisons

nucleusCytoplasm.status: solver-active NC comparison / shared-node baseline preserved separately / stabilization-validated

cellDish.status: solver-active / s7-h reactivated on current native mesh

pipetteNucleus.status: omitted after shared-node nucleus-cytoplasm coupling; pipette-cell pressure/contact remains solver-active
pipetteNucleus.inactiveReason: shared-node force transfer removed the stabilizer requirement

pressure.name: cell_dish_normal_preload
pressure.direction: cell-dish-normal-preload; positive pressure on -z basal cell surface pushes toward dish

notes: pressure load is sourced directly from native case loads.suctionPressure
cell-dish normal preload is active for bounded S7-L comparison

aspiration.name: pipette_aspiration_length
aspiration.definition: Clamp to >=0 the projected distance from the pipette mouth plane to the most upward aspirated nucleus/cytoplasm node.
